message:
feat(polyfills): add async child_process, DNS promises, ChaCha20, secp256k1, HTTP pooling

Phase 7 polyfill enhancements:

- child_process: Add async spawn/exec/execFile/fork with ChildProcess class
- dns: Add resolveCname/Ns/Soa/Ptr and dns.promises API
- crypto: Add ChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD and secp256k1 curve support
- buffer: Add byteLength() and includes() methods
- util: Add parseArgs(), stripVTControlCharacters(), toUSVString()
- http: Full connection pooling in Agent with keepAlive and maxSockets
